problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Ketamine-like. Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
